item.title: word_count
item.description: Vault Stats This vault currently contains 13,818 words across all notes.

item.title: Unlinked_Pages
item.description: Unlinked Notes Recently_Updated Baseball choke Two grip choke on turtle Close guard overhook stiff Crusifix Straight ankle lock Grip break on upper back Cross collar grip break to takedown Collar grip break downward Double ankle grab pass Double under Toreando Leg drag S grip Lapel choke defence Sid...

item.title: Empty_Pages
item.description: Empty Notes Canto choke Kimura Estima lock Gogoplata North south Hook Drills Double leg Rubber guard .

item.title: Recently_Updated
item.description: Recently Updated Notes Gameplan README Formatting index Banana split Kimura & Americana Three sisters Buggy choke Bow and arrow Twister .

item.title: BJJ journey
item.description: Author I am a 34 year old white belt, who started 08/2023.

item.title: Shoulder Drop
item.description: General Move from Standing where you control the opponents arm with two of yours, or alternatively have Sleeve and collar grip.

item.title: Guard retention drills
item.description: General Great Drills for ingraining guard retention into muscle memory Rotating with opponent On back with legs on defensive posture.

item.title: Neck related
item.description: General These are Drills that aim to strengthen the neck and support Moves Handstand Start of by posting head and hands on mat.

item.title: Side shimmy practice
item.description: The usual sunday Drills. Find a proper name and explanation for this.
